Describe the specific actions performed on the shrimp throughout the preparation sequence.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a hand holds a raw shrimp above a glass bowl; at 8s, a peeled shrimp is held over the bowl; at 12s, hands hold a raw food item directly above a clear bowl; at 14s, two hands pull apart the food item; at 18s, hands peel a pinkish object over the bowl.

question: Describe the visual transition from the introduction to the food preparation steps.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man wearing a chef's coat stands in a kitchen; at 2s, white text overlay appears in the top right corner; at 6s, a hand holds a single raw shrimp over a bowl; at 12s, hands manipulate a pale food item over a bowl; at 18s, hands peel a translucent object over a tiled countertop.
